On 8/17/10 9:11 AM, Johann Kois wrote:
> Hm,
> 
> any idea if that is an "official" place?  Or could we get into troubles
> if we link to that page/document?
> 
> Because the document is rather hidden on that page.  At least I did not
> find a link to it on the website.
> 

I did think of that, and I'm not sure if it is an official place.
Unfortunately, all of the links I was able to find seemed rather unofficial.

Would it be best to either:

1.) Reference the document, but do not provide a link

2.) Remove the reference entirely

Regards,

- -- 
Glen Barber
